name: @interego/mdvault
description: General Markdown-vault -> linked-data projection engine over @interego/core. A directory of Markdown-with-YAML-LD-frontmatter notes projects to a graph; the projection is PROFILE-DRIVEN (context-resolution, identity-minting, link grammar, rung ceiling are knobs set by a declarative profile). Vault-LD is ONE profile (data), never a module here.
author: Mark Spivey
